hyperedges.label: Message Processing Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Core NLU → filtering → recommendation flow that processes every inbound chat message

hyperedges.label: Business Intelligence Layer
hyperedges.description: All query Supabase for operational metrics: orders, revenue, AI costs, conversion, strategy performance

hyperedges.label: Event Persistence Layer
hyperedges.description: Both write structured lifecycle and business events to the event_logs table in Supabase

hyperedges.label: Response Module Pipeline
hyperedges.description: The response module was extracted from responseEngine.ts into 5 functional sub-modules (formatting, errorHandler, aiHandler, messageBuilder, flowController) and re-exported through a barrel index. flowController orchestrates the others: it imports formatting (hasAny), errorHandler (applySafetyFilter, applyFallback), aiHandler (applyAntiLoop, parseUserRequest, extractProductEntities, extractCategoryEntities, matchProducts), and messageBuilder (getDeliveryPrompt, getPromptByStage, generateUpsell, buildRecommendations). errorHandler is also imported by messageBuilder. This forms a layered dependency chain: formatting → errorHandler → messageBuilder + aiHandler → flowController → index.

hyperedges.label: Admin Panel Architecture
hyperedges.description: Admin panel with 4 main pages wrapped in AdminLayout. AdminLayout provides: session auth via /api/admin/me, role-based sidebar (admin/gerente/staff), 30min inactivity timeout with warning countdown, collapsible sidebar, pending orders badge. AdminDashboard shows realtime KPIs (revenue, conversion, upsell) with Supabase realtime channel and alertEngine integration. ProductsPage provides full CRUD with image upload and custom categories. SettingsPage manages store open/close, promo banners, hero text. SalesOptimizationPage analyzes order data for best sellers, low performers, combo opportunities.

hyperedges.label: handleMessageModular Intent Routing
hyperedges.description: handleMessageModular implements a complex intent-driven routing pipeline: (1) greeting guard, (2) intent detection via detectIntent, (3) flow state resolution via resolveNextState, (4) specialized intercepts for AWAITING_REVIEW, AWAITING_REVIEW_COMMENT, AWAITING_PAYMENT, AWAITING_UPSELL, LOYALTY_QUERY, REDEEM_POINTS, (5) product matching via matchProducts from aiHandler, (6) safety filtering via applySafetyFilter from errorHandler, (7) multi-tier fallback via applyFallback, (8) intent switch: SHOW_MENU, SHOW_CATEGORY, ADD_TO_CART, RECOMMEND, VIEW_CART, CONFIRM_ORDER, UNKNOWN. ADD_TO_CART has extensive guards: duplicate prevention, cart size limit, stock check, greeting rejection, weak intent rejection. CONFIRM_ORDER integrates Conekta payment link generation, loyalty point redemption at checkout. buildRecommendations from messageBuilder is used for RECOMMEND intent.

nodes.label: createPaymentLink
nodes.description: Creates a Conekta HostedPayment checkout order, returns PaymentLink with url, expiresAt, conektaOrderId, checkoutId. Sets 24h expiry and allows cash/card/bank_transfer payment methods.

nodes.label: getPaymentStatus
nodes.description: Fetches order status and payment_status from Conekta API by conektaOrderId.

nodes.label: verifyWebhookSignature
nodes.description: Verifies Conekta webhook payload using HMAC-SHA256 with CONEKTA_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Uses timingSafeEqual for comparison.

nodes.label: handleWebhook
nodes.description: Parses and validates a Conekta webhook event: verifies signature, parses JSON payload into ConektaWebhookEvent.

nodes.label: extractOrderId
nodes.description: Extracts internal order_id from Conekta webhook event metadata.

nodes.label: mapConektaEventToPaymentStatus
nodes.description: Maps Conekta event type + payment_status to internal values: paid, expired, cancelled, pending.

nodes.label: ConektaWebhookEvent
nodes.description: TypeScript interface for Conekta webhook event structure including nested charge data, metadata, and payment status.

nodes.label: PaymentLink
nodes.description: Interface for Conekta payment link result: url, expiresAt, conektaOrderId, checkoutId.

nodes.label: PaymentLinkParams
nodes.description: Input params for payment link creation: orderId, customerName, customerPhone, total, items, currency.

nodes.label: buildPaymentMessage
nodes.description: Builds WhatsApp-formatted payment link message with order items list, total in MXN, and expiry time.

nodes.label: buildPaymentConfirmedMessage
nodes.description: Builds WhatsApp confirmation message after successful payment with order ID and total.

nodes.label: buildPaymentExpiredMessage
nodes.description: Builds WhatsApp message notifying customer that their payment link has expired.

nodes.label: startPaymentChecker
nodes.description: Starts a periodic timer (default 5 min) that checks for and expires stale awaiting_payment orders. Returns stop function. Idempotent — ignores duplicate calls.

nodes.label: checkAndExpirePayments
nodes.description: Queries orders table for expired payment links (payment_url_expires_at < now), updates status to payment_expired, sends WhatsApp expiry message to customer.

nodes.label: stopPaymentChecker
nodes.description: Stops the periodic payment expiry checker by clearing the timeout.

nodes.label: calculateTipOptions
nodes.description: Returns tiered tip suggestions based on order total: <$150->[10,15,20], <$300->[20,30,50], >=$300->[30,50,80].

nodes.label: buildTipMessage
nodes.description: Builds WhatsApp tip request message with 3 suggested amounts. Optionally inserts last tip amount for personalization.

nodes.label: processTipResponse
nodes.description: Parses free-form customer tip reply accepting numeric, $prefix, Spanish words (veinte, treinta...), and decline signals (no, omitir, cero). Returns tipAmount=-1 sentinel for unrecognized input.

nodes.label: saveTipRecord
nodes.description: Persists tip decision to customer_tips table with customer_id, order_id, tip_amount, order_total.

nodes.label: hasTipRecord
nodes.description: Idempotency guard: checks if a tip record already exists for an order to prevent double-asking.

nodes.label: scheduleTipRequest
nodes.description: Fire-and-forget tip request: waits 10s after payment, checks idempotency, sends tip message via WhatsApp, inserts sentinel row (tip_amount=-1).

nodes.label: TipResult
nodes.description: Interface for tip processing result: tipAmount and responseMessage.

nodes.label: TipRecord
nodes.description: DB record interface for customer_tips table: customer_id, order_id, tip_amount, order_total.

nodes.label: DECLINE_WORDS
nodes.description: Set of Spanish words signaling tip decline: no, nop, gracias, omitir, sin propina, ninguna, cero, 0.

nodes.label: SPANISH_NUMBERS
nodes.description: Map of Spanish number words to numeric values for tip parsing: cero, uno, diez, quince, veinte, treinta, cuarenta, cincuenta, sesenta, setenta, ochenta, noventa, cien.

nodes.label: sendText
nodes.description: Sends plain text WhatsApp message via Meta Graph API v19.0. Falls back to console.log in dev mode when credentials are missing.

nodes.label: sendList
nodes.description: Sends WhatsApp interactive list message (up to 10 rows) via Meta API.

nodes.label: sendButtons
nodes.description: Sends WhatsApp interactive reply buttons (up to 3) via Meta API. Button titles truncated to 20 chars.

nodes.label: sendMainMenu
nodes.description: Sends full Snacks 911 main menu as interactive list with 6 food categories and 2 action items (promos, recommendations).

nodes.label: sendSauceSelector
nodes.description: Sends sauce selection buttons (BBQ, Mango Habanero, Sin salsa) for a given product.

nodes.label: sendUpsellOffer
nodes.description: Sends upsell accept/decline buttons with custom message.

nodes.label: sendHandoffMessage
nodes.description: Sends human handoff message asking customer to confirm name and order for support escalation.

nodes.label: META_BASE
nodes.description: WhatsApp Cloud API base URL: https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0.

nodes.label: getSession
nodes.description: Gets or creates a WhatsApp bot session from wa_sessions table. Returns fallback S0_IDLE session on error.

nodes.label: updateState
nodes.description: Upserts bot state into wa_sessions table for a phone number.

nodes.label: addToCart
nodes.description: Adds item to cart, merging quantity if product already exists.

nodes.label: removeFromCart
nodes.description: Removes item from cart by fuzzy product name match.

nodes.label: setSauceOnLastItem
nodes.description: Sets sauce on the last cart item that doesn't have one yet.

nodes.label: clearCart
nodes.description: Empties cart and resets state to S0_IDLE.

nodes.label: incrementUnknown
nodes.description: Increments unknown_count on session; used as handoff threshold.

nodes.label: formatCartText
nodes.description: Formats cart items as WhatsApp-readable text with line items and total.

nodes.label: logEvent
nodes.description: Logs KPI events to wa_events table with phone_number, event_type, and payload.

nodes.label: saveSession
nodes.description: Upserts full BotSession (state, cart_data, last_interaction) into wa_sessions.

nodes.label: BotState
nodes.description: Finite-state machine states for WhatsApp bot: S0_IDLE, S1_BROWSING_MENU, S2_BUILDING_CART, S3_NEED_SAUCE, S4_UPSELL_OFFER, S5_CONFIRM, S6_CHECKOUT, S7_HANDOFF.

nodes.label: BotSession
nodes.description: Interface for WhatsApp bot session: phone_number, state, cart_data, unknown_count, last_interaction.

nodes.label: CartItem
nodes.description: Cart item interface: product, qty, unit_price, sauce, modifiers.

nodes.label: wa_sessions
nodes.description: Supabase table storing WhatsApp bot session state, cart data, and interaction timestamps keyed by phone_number.

nodes.label: wa_events
nodes.description: Supabase table for WhatsApp bot KPI events with phone_number, event_type, and payload columns.

nodes.label: getAIResponse
nodes.description: Calls Gemini AI with strict system prompt to classify intent and generate sales response. Auto-corrects malformed JSON on first failure. Falls back to ASK_MISSING_INFO safe response on error.

nodes.label: buildContextPayload
nodes.description: Assembles AIContext payload from products, modifiers, announcements, promos, cart state, and customer message.

nodes.label: rewriteMessage
nodes.description: Uses Gemini to rewrite a base message to sound more appetizing and persuasive with emojis and food appeal. Falls back to original message on error.

nodes.label: SYSTEM_PROMPT
nodes.description: Gemini system prompt defining chatbot persona for Snacks 911 (Mexican fast food). Constrains output to JSON-only, sets intent taxonomy, enforces 2-line message limit, and mandates casual Mexican tone.

nodes.label: AIContext
nodes.description: Interface for AI call context: menu_items, modifiers, announcements, promos, cart_state, customer_message.

nodes.label: AIResponse
nodes.description: Interface for AI call response: intent, entities, message_to_user, intent_suggestion, missing_fields.

nodes.label: MenuItemContext
nodes.description: Structured menu item data for AI context: name, price, category, description, best_seller.

nodes.label: SALES_PLAYBOOKS
nodes.description: Deterministic upsell scripts per product: maps canonical product name to array of UpsellOffer (COMBO_UPGRADE or ADDON). Includes Boneless 250g, Alitas 6pz, Papas clásicas, Papas con queso, Salchipapas, Banderilla coreana, Dedos de queso.

nodes.label: getRecommendation
nodes.description: Returns budget-tiered product recommendations: <=$150 suggests Boneless/Papas Loaded, <=$200 suggests Boneless Power/Combo Banderilla, else Combo Mixto/Alitas Fuego. Accepts spice preference to annotate recommendations.

nodes.label: OBJECTION_RESPONSES
nodes.description: Pre-written objection handler responses for 'price' (upsell to Boneless Power combo) and 'portion' (reassure about generous portions).

nodes.label: UpsellOffer
nodes.description: Interface for upsell offer: type (COMBO_UPGRADE/ADDON), message, upgrade_to/addon_name, addon_price, intent_key.

nodes.label: Recommendation
nodes.description: Interface for product recommendation result: product name, price, and reason string.

nodes.label: getSupabaseAdmin
nodes.description: Creates SupabaseClient with service_role key (bypasses RLS). Requires NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env vars.

nodes.label: supabaseAnon
nodes.description: Server-side Supabase client using anon key (RLS respected). Creates client with persistSession:false.

nodes.label: getCustomerProfileFromDB
nodes.description: Queries customers table by phone_number, returns CustomerProfile with name, totalOrders, lastOrderAt, favoriteProduct, preferences, restrictions.

nodes.label: upsertCustomerProfile
nodes.description: Upserts customer row by phone_number (onConflict). Updates name, favorite_product, preferences, restrictions.

nodes.label: customers
nodes.description: Supabase table for customer profiles with columns: phone_number, name, total_orders, last_order_date, last_order_total, favorite_product, preferences, restrictions, created_at.

nodes.label: orders
nodes.description: Supabase table for orders with columns: id, customer_name, customer_phone, total, payment_url_expires_at, status, payment_status, paid_at.

nodes.label: customer_tips
nodes.description: Supabase table for tip tracking with columns: customer_id, order_id, tip_amount (-1=sentinel for asked-not-answered), order_total.

nodes.label: hashPassword
nodes.description: Hashes password using PBKDF2 with 100,000 iterations, 32-byte random salt, 64-byte key length, SHA-512 digest.

nodes.label: verifyPassword
nodes.description: Verifies password against stored PBKDF2 hash using timingSafeEqual for constant-time comparison.

nodes.label: getEmployeeByLoginId
nodes.description: Fetches active employee from employees table by employee_id. Uses maybeSingle for null-safe returns.

nodes.label: createEmployee
nodes.description: Creates employee in employees table with hashed password. Checks for duplicate employee_id first (custom error). Handles DB UNIQUE constraint 23505.

nodes.label: updateLastLogin
nodes.description: Updates last_login_at timestamp on employees table for a given employee_id.

nodes.label: deactivateEmployee
nodes.description: Soft-deletes employee by setting active=false.

nodes.label: listEmployees
nodes.description: Lists all employees ordered by created_at descending.

nodes.label: initDefaultAdmin
nodes.description: Bootstraps default admin (admin001/Snacks911!) if employees table is empty and ALLOW_DEFAULT_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP=true.

nodes.label: Employee
nodes.description: Employee interface with roles: admin, gerente, staff. Fields: id, employeeId, passwordHash, passwordSalt, name, role, active, createdAt, lastLoginAt.

nodes.label: PBKDF2 parameters
nodes.description: PBKDF2 config: 100,000 iterations, 64-byte key, 32-byte salt, SHA-512 digest.

nodes.label: employees
nodes.description: Supabase table for employee auth: employee_id, password_hash, password_salt, name, role, active, created_at, last_login_at.

nodes.label: createSessionToken
nodes.description: Creates HMAC-SHA256 signed JWT-like session token with payload (uid, role, exp). Token format: base64url(payload).base64url(signature). Default max age 12h.

nodes.label: verifySessionToken
nodes.description: Verifies HMAC signature of session token and checks expiration. Returns decoded payload or null.

nodes.label: ADMIN_SESSION_COOKIE
nodes.description: Cookie name for admin session: 'snacks911_admin_session'.

nodes.label: EMPLOYEE_SESSION_COOKIE
nodes.description: Cookie name for employee session: 'snacks911_employee_session'.

nodes.label: ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET
nodes.description: Environment variable for HMAC session signing key. Must be at least 32 characters. Uses Web Crypto API SubtleCrypto for HMAC-SHA256.

nodes.label: getApiSession
nodes.description: Extracts session from Request cookies, tries both admin and employee cookie tokens. Returns verified session payload or null.

nodes.label: requireApiRole
nodes.description: Checks if authenticated session has one of the allowed roles. Returns 401 JSON response if unauthorized.

nodes.label: PERSISTENCE
nodes.description: Declares Supabase-only persistence strategy. MongoDB integration has been removed.

nodes.label: createUuid
nodes.description: Generates UUID v4 using crypto.randomUUID() when available, falls back to Math.random-based implementation.

nodes.label: normalizeText
nodes.description: Normalizes text for matching: lowercases, decomposes Unicode (NFD), strips diacritics, replaces punctuation with spaces, collapses whitespace.

nodes.label: parseCookie
nodes.description: Extracts named cookie value from Request headers using regex matching.

nodes.label: getConversationContext
nodes.description: Delegates to getContext from core/context to retrieve cart items and total for a session ID.

nodes.label: saveFailure
nodes.description: Saves bot failure entry to src/data/learning/failures.json. Deduplicates by input+failureType. Creates directory and file if needed. Server-only (checks for window).

nodes.label: FailureEntry
nodes.description: Interface for learning failure entry: input, detectedIntent, failureType, output, timestamp.

nodes.label: failures.json
nodes.description: Persistent file at src/data/learning/failures.json for storing bot failure examples for later ML training.

nodes.label: formatWhatsAppMessage
nodes.description: Formats product list for WhatsApp display: strips emojis from header/footer, assigns category emojis per product, limits to 5 products, hard truncates to 300 characters.

nodes.label: getProductEmoji
nodes.description: Maps product category to display emoji: papas->🍟, banderilla->🌭, combo->🔥, postre/brownie->🍫, bebida->🥤, default->🍗.

nodes.label: generateWhatsAppLink
nodes.description: Generates wa.me direct link to Snacks 911 phone (525610885062) with pre-filled order message including item, extras, and total.

nodes.label: MENU
nodes.description: Static menu array with 16 items across 5 categories: COMBOS (7), PROTEINA (2), PAPAS (3), BANDERILLAS (2), BEBIDAS (1). Simple version without images or descriptions.

nodes.label: products
nodes.description: Full product catalog array with 17 items across 6 categories: combos (7), proteina (2), papas (3), banderillas (2), bebidas (1), extras (2). Each item has description, price, ingredients, spicy rating, badges, originalPrice.

nodes.label: Product
nodes.description: Product interface: id, name, description, price, category, image, ingredients, spicy, popular, badge(s), originalPrice, available.

nodes.label: categories
nodes.description: Category filter definitions: todos, combos, proteina, papas, banderillas, bebidas, extras. Each with id and label.

nodes.label: getProductImage
nodes.description: Resolves product image path from PRODUCT_IMAGE_MAP by id, then by name substring, then by category. Falls back to /images/logo.png.

nodes.label: PRODUCT_IMAGE_MAP
nodes.description: Static mapping of product IDs (numeric and string) to image file paths for product display fallback.

nodes.label: Conekta API
nodes.description: External payment gateway API at https://api.conekta.io. Used for creating HostedPayment checkout orders and querying payment status. Auth via Basic token from CONEKTA_API_KEY.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Cloud API
nodes.description: Meta Graph API v19.0 for WhatsApp messaging. Requires WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID and WHATSAPP_TOKEN. Supports text, interactive list, and interactive button message types.

nodes.label: Gemini AI
nodes.description: Google Generative AI (Gemini) via @google/generative-ai SDK. Default model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Configured via GEMINI_API_KEY and GEMINI_MODEL env vars. Used for intent detection, response generation, and message rewriting.

nodes.label: Supabase
nodes.description: Supabase backend (Postgres + Auth). Access via @supabase/supabase-js. Two client modes: service_role (bypasses RLS) for admin ops, and anon key for RLS-respected access.

nodes.label: lib/whatsapp/botEngine
nodes.description: Re-exports all exports from @/core/botEngine. Thin barrel file.

nodes.label: lib/whatsapp/intentDetector
nodes.description: Re-exports all exports from @/core/intentDetector. Thin barrel file.

nodes.label: CONEKTA_API_KEY
nodes.description: Env var for Conekta API private key used in Basic auth header.

nodes.label: CONEKTA_WEBHOOK_SECRET
nodes.description: Env var for Conekta webhook HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Verification skipped if not set.

nodes.label: WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID
nodes.description: Env var for Meta WhatsApp business phone number ID. Also reads WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID as fallback.

nodes.label: WHATSAPP_TOKEN
nodes.description: Env var for Meta WhatsApp Cloud API access token. Also reads WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN as fallback.

nodes.label: GEMINI_API_KEY
nodes.description: Env var for Google Gemini API key.

nodes.label: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
nodes.description: Env var for Supabase service_role key used by getSupabaseAdmin. Grants full RLS bypass access.

nodes.label: ALLOW_DEFAULT_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP
nodes.description: Env var guard for initDefaultAdmin. When 'true', bootsraps admin001 with password Snacks911! if no employees exist.

nodes.label: ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET
nodes.description: Env var for HMAC session token signing key. Must be at least 32 characters.

nodes.label: errorHandler.ts
nodes.description: Error handling: applySafetyFilter delegates to allergyFilter; applyFallback implements multi-tier fallback (safe → matched → top5 → all).

nodes.label: messageBuilder.ts
nodes.description: Message builders: generateUpsell (per-category upsell logic), getPromptByStage (stage+intent-aware prompt selector, GOD MODE), getDeliveryPrompt (delivery step prompts), buildOrderConfirmation, buildRecommendations (shuffled variety of combo+papas+proteína).

nodes.label: formatting.ts
nodes.description: Text utilities: hasAny (substring check), normalizeConstraintList (deduplicate/lowercase/trim), sanitizeRestrictedMentions (replace prohibited product names with '[opción segura]').

nodes.label: flowController.ts
nodes.description: Conversation flow orchestrator extracted from responseEngine. Exports INITIAL_STATE constant, handleMessage (legacy GOD MODE pipeline), handleMessageModular (new modular pipeline with intent detection, allergy constraints, upsell engine, loyalty engine, review engine, payment flow via Conekta).

nodes.label: aiHandler.ts
nodes.description: AI utilities: applyAntiLoop (strategy rotation on detected loop), parseUserRequest (extract include/exclude keywords), extractProductEntities, extractCategoryEntities, matchProducts (filter by intent + entities).

nodes.label: response/index.ts (barrel)
nodes.description: Public API barrel file re-exporting all response module functions: formatting, errorHandler, aiHandler, messageBuilder, flowController.

nodes.label: memoryAgent.ts
nodes.description: AI memory agent: calls Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite to extract customer insights (preferences, restrictions, favorite_product, name) from conversation history. Merges insights into Supabase customers table via upsert.

nodes.label: RootLayout
nodes.description: Next.js root layout with Inter (body) and Bebas Neue (display) fonts, Spanish lang, smooth scroll, preloaded hero image.

nodes.label: Page (Homepage)
nodes.description: Client-side homepage: dynamic imports of Navbar, Hero, CombosSection, Cart, UpsellModal, PromoBanner, ReviewSection, ContactSection, SiteFooter, OrderBot, WelcomeModal, CustomCursor. Uses cartStore for cart state, analytics track(), IntersectionObserver scroll reveal.

nodes.label: AdminLayout
nodes.description: Admin panel layout: session verification via /api/admin/me, role-based sidebar navigation (admin, gerente, staff), 30min inactivity timeout with warning modal, dynamic sidebar collapse, pending orders badge polling.

nodes.label: AdminDashboard
nodes.description: Executive business dashboard: daily revenue KPI, conversion/upsell rates, critical alerts from alertEngine, store open/close toggle, quick nav to POS/Cash/Orders, Supabase realtime channel for live KPI updates.

nodes.label: SettingsPage
nodes.description: Admin settings: store open/close toggle with custom closed message, promo banner activation/text, hero title/subtitle customization. Uses storeSettingsStore.

nodes.label: ProductsPage
nodes.description: Admin product manager: CRUD with AdminStore, category filter/search, image upload (FileReader + URL fallback), available toggle, custom category creation, extras applicable-product selector.

nodes.label: SalesOptimizationPage
nodes.description: Sales optimization: analyzes orders→products via analyzeSales(), shows best sellers / low performers / combo opportunities, one-click apply (toggle availability, create combos), active promos display.

nodes.label: inventory.test.ts
nodes.description: Manual test: verifies inventoryFilter removes stock≤0 items, keeps stock>0.

nodes.label: orderFlow.test.ts
nodes.description: Manual test: validates resolveNextState transitions (inicio→explorando, explorando→ordenando, UNKNOWN stays).

nodes.label: cartEngine.test.ts
nodes.description: Manual test: addToCart total/quantity accumulation, invalid cart reset, price/id sanitization.

nodes.label: strategy.test.ts
nodes.description: Manual test: getNextStrategy deterministic rotation (antojo→fomo→social→anchor), getBestStrategySync returns valid type, caching behavior.

nodes.label: allergyFilter.test.ts
nodes.description: Jest test: isProductSafe with exact match, bidirectional matching, salchicha→banderilla rule; filterProducts integration.

nodes.label: manual-flow-check.ts
nodes.description: Manual integration test: calls getBotResponse with 5 WhatsApp flow cases (hola→SHOW_MENU, quiero boneless→ADD_TO_CART, etc.), checks intent accuracy.

nodes.label: whatsapp-flow.test.ts
nodes.description: Comprehensive flow test with evaluator: 60+ eval cases covering ADD_TO_CART (slang/typos), SHOW_CATEGORY, SHOW_MENU, RECOMMEND, VIEW_CART, CONFIRM_ORDER. Uses mocked db.server and evaluateBot.

nodes.label: intentDetector.test.ts
nodes.description: Jest test: extractAllergies from 'sin X', 'soy alérgico a X', 'no puedo comer X', multiple allergies, filtering common words; detectIntent integration.

links.description: Tests isProductSafe and filterProducts used by applySafetyFilter in errorHandler.
Tests detectIntent and extractAllergies used by handleMessageModular pipeline.
Tests addToCart used in handleMessageModular cart operations.
Tests resolveNextState used in handleMessageModular flow state machine.
Tests inventoryFilter used in handleMessageModular to filter out-of-stock products.
End-to-end modular flow test via getBotResponse → botEngine → responseEngine pipeline.
Manual integration test via getBotResponse with static product mocks.
memoryAgent processes WhatsApp conversation history to extract customer insights stored in Supabase; Page renders OrderBot which drives WhatsApp conversations.

hyperedges.label: Message Processing Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Core NLU → filtering → recommendation flow that processes every inbound chat message

hyperedges.label: Business Intelligence Layer
hyperedges.description: All query Supabase for operational metrics: orders, revenue, AI costs, conversion, strategy performance

hyperedges.label: Event Persistence Layer
hyperedges.description: Both write structured lifecycle and business events to the event_logs table in Supabase

hyperedges.label: Response Module Pipeline
hyperedges.description: The response module was extracted from responseEngine.ts into 5 functional sub-modules (formatting, errorHandler, aiHandler, messageBuilder, flowController) and re-exported through a barrel index. flowController orchestrates the others: it imports formatting (hasAny), errorHandler (applySafetyFilter, applyFallback), aiHandler (applyAntiLoop, parseUserRequest, extractProductEntities, extractCategoryEntities, matchProducts), and messageBuilder (getDeliveryPrompt, getPromptByStage, generateUpsell, buildRecommendations). errorHandler is also imported by messageBuilder. This forms a layered dependency chain: formatting → errorHandler → messageBuilder + aiHandler → flowController → index.

hyperedges.label: Admin Panel Architecture
hyperedges.description: Admin panel with 4 main pages wrapped in AdminLayout. AdminLayout provides: session auth via /api/admin/me, role-based sidebar (admin/gerente/staff), 30min inactivity timeout with warning countdown, collapsible sidebar, pending orders badge. AdminDashboard shows realtime KPIs (revenue, conversion, upsell) with Supabase realtime channel and alertEngine integration. ProductsPage provides full CRUD with image upload and custom categories. SettingsPage manages store open/close, promo banners, hero text. SalesOptimizationPage analyzes order data for best sellers, low performers, combo opportunities.

hyperedges.label: handleMessageModular Intent Routing
hyperedges.description: handleMessageModular implements a complex intent-driven routing pipeline: (1) greeting guard, (2) intent detection via detectIntent, (3) flow state resolution via resolveNextState, (4) specialized intercepts for AWAITING_REVIEW, AWAITING_REVIEW_COMMENT, AWAITING_PAYMENT, AWAITING_UPSELL, LOYALTY_QUERY, REDEEM_POINTS, (5) product matching via matchProducts from aiHandler, (6) safety filtering via applySafetyFilter from errorHandler, (7) multi-tier fallback via applyFallback, (8) intent switch: SHOW_MENU, SHOW_CATEGORY, ADD_TO_CART, RECOMMEND, VIEW_CART, CONFIRM_ORDER, UNKNOWN. ADD_TO_CART has extensive guards: duplicate prevention, cart size limit, stock check, greeting rejection, weak intent rejection. CONFIRM_ORDER integrates Conekta payment link generation, loyalty point redemption at checkout. buildRecommendations from messageBuilder is used for RECOMMEND intent.
